Hero.title: Unique Audio Solutions For You
Hero.subtitle: Exclusive distributor for K-Array, KGEAR, and KSCAPE in Cyprus, Armenia, Georgia, Kazakhstan and beyond. Request a design for your project or become an integrator.

Brands.karray_desc: Ultra-compact audio solutions with invisible profiles for discrete integration. High-end professional audio for your house, restaurant, club or anywhere you want to have a unique sound.
Brands.kgear_desc: High-performance everyday audio gear maximizing value without compromising quality. Cafes, restaurants and clubs have a wider range of choices, offering flexibility, simplicity and reliability.
Brands.kscape_desc: Where light meets sound. Integrated lighting and audio systems for seamless architecture. No longer look for speaker placments, just integrate the lights and the sound together without compromising the aesthetics and most importantly sound quality of the space.
Brands.karray_features: Premium quality, Discreet design, Innovative arrays
